summary: Guardian AI (Predictive Intelligence) - All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with risk score card, recommended action, layer breakdown, risk factors, AI narrative, sensitivity/thresholds config, and prediction history. All 6 endpoints working correctly. SSE handler registered for guardian_ai_alert.

GET /api/guardian-ai/config.returns_config: PASS - Returns config with all fields (id, user_id, enabled, sensitivity, notification_threshold, call_threshold, sos_threshold, auto_trigger, cooldown_minutes, updated_at)
GET /api/guardian-ai/config.default_thresholds: PASS - Default thresholds: notification=0.6, call=0.75, sos=0.85, cooldown=30min

PUT /api/guardian-ai/config.validates_sensitivity: PASS - Returns 422 for invalid sensitivity value

POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.returns_prediction: PASS - Returns id, risk_score, risk_level, confidence, recommended_action, action_detail, risk_factors, layer_scores, narrative, status, lat, lng, created_at
POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.risk_level_values: PASS - Returns low/moderate/high/critical based on score
POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.layer_breakdown: PASS - Returns realtime (50%), location (25%), behavioral (25%) scores
POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.action_detail: PASS - Returns action description with urgency (low/medium/high/critical)
POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.works_without_location: PASS - Accepts empty body, prediction works without lat/lng
POST /api/guardian-ai/predict-risk.narrative_generated: PASS - Returns narrative text summarizing assessment

POST /api/guardian-ai/accept-action/{id}.updates_status_accepted: PASS - Updates prediction status to 'accepted', sets user_response='accept', responded_at

POST /api/guardian-ai/dismiss/{id}.updates_status_dismissed: PASS - Updates prediction status to 'dismissed', sets user_response='dismiss', responded_at

GET /api/guardian-ai/history.entry_structure: PASS - Each entry has id, risk_score, risk_level, confidence, recommended_action, action_detail, risk_factors, layer_scores, narrative, status, created_at

frontend_ui.nav-guardian-ai: PASS - Navigation link in sidebar, highlighted with teal when active
frontend_ui.guardian-ai-page: PASS - Main container loads with data-testid

recommended-action-card.action_buttons: PASS - Shows Accept/Dismiss buttons for pending predictions
recommended-action-card.status_badge: PASS - Shows completed/accepted/dismissed status badge for non-pending

layer-breakdown-card.realtime_50: PASS - Real-time (50%) with Zap icon, progress bar
layer-breakdown-card.location_25: PASS - Location (25%) with Target icon, progress bar
layer-breakdown-card.behavioral_25: PASS - Behavioral (25%) with Activity icon, progress bar (showing 77% in test)

risk-factors-card.factor_entries: PASS - Shows factors with severity badges (high/medium)
risk-factors-card.factor_detail: PASS - Shows factor type and detail text

ai-narrative-card.narrative_text: PASS - Shows full narrative text in teal background box

sensitivity-config-card.notif_threshold_slider: PASS - Range slider with percentage display (60%)
sensitivity-config-card.call_threshold_slider: PASS - Range slider with percentage display (75%)
sensitivity-config-card.sos_threshold_slider: PASS - Range slider with percentage display (85%)
sensitivity-config-card.cooldown_input: PASS - Numeric input for cooldown minutes (30)

frontend_ui.run-prediction-btn: PASS - Run Prediction button triggers prediction, updates UI

prediction-history-card.visible: PASS - Expandable section with count in header (11)
prediction-history-card.history_entries: PASS - Each entry shows percentage, risk level badge, action icon, status badge, timestamp, confidence, factor count

sse_handlers.guardian_ai_alert: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (lines 1551-1566), setGuardianAIAlert called, toast notifications for high/critical (error) and moderate (warning) risk levels

existing_features.escape_call_nav: PASS - Navigation link visible and clickable
existing_features.escape_notification_nav: PASS - Navigation link visible and clickable
existing_features.sos_nav: PASS - Navigation link visible and clickable

critical_code_review_comments: Prediction uses 50/25/25 weighting: Real-time signals (50%), Location intelligence (25%), Behavioral patterns (25%)
Risk classification: critical (>=0.85), high (>=0.6), moderate (>=0.35), low (<0.35)
Action thresholds with sensitivity multiplier: low=0.8x, medium=1.0x, high=1.2x
Auto-completes as 'completed' when recommended_action='monitor' (no user response needed)
Actionable predictions (notification/call/sos) start as 'pending' with Accept/Dismiss buttons
SSE broadcasts to user and operators when action != 'monitor'
History sorted by created_at DESC with configurable limit
Config auto-creates with defaults on first GET request
Validation: sensitivity must be low/medium/high, cooldown 5-1440 minutes, thresholds 0.0-1.0
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Config auto-created with defaults on first access. Multiple test predictions created during pytest and UI testing with 19% LOW RISK (behavioral anomaly at 77%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian AI fully tested. Backend: 6 endpoints under /api/guardian-ai prefix - config GET/PUT, predict-risk POST, accept-action POST, dismiss POST, history GET. Prediction engine pulls data from 3 Safety Brain layers (real-time via get_user_risk_status, location via compute_location_risk, behavioral via analyze_behavior) with 50/25/25 weighting. Current test data shows 19% LOW RISK with behavioral anomaly (repeated wandering at 77%). Config auto-creates with defaults (enabled=true, sensitivity=medium, thresholds: notif=0.6, call=0.75, sos=0.85, cooldown=30min). Frontend: GuardianAIPage at /family/guardian-ai shows prediction result (score, level, confidence, coordinates), recommended action with urgency, layer breakdown progress bars, risk factors with severity, AI narrative, sensitivity & thresholds config (dropdown, sliders, toggles, cooldown), expandable history. FamilyDashboard SSE handler for guardian_ai_alert shows toast notifications. All Escape Layer features (Call, Notification, SOS) verified still working.

verified_features.config_get: Working - Returns/auto-creates config with all fields
verified_features.config_put: Working - Updates all config fields with validation
verified_features.predict_risk: Working - Returns full prediction with layer breakdown, factors, narrative
verified_features.accept_action: Working - Updates status to accepted with responded_at
verified_features.dismiss: Working - Updates status to dismissed with responded_at
verified_features.history: Working - Returns sorted predictions with count
verified_features.risk_score_card: Working - Shows percentage, level badge, confidence, coordinates
verified_features.recommended_action_card: Working - Shows action type, urgency, Accept/Dismiss buttons
verified_features.risk_factors_card: Working - Shows factors with severity badges
verified_features.sensitivity_config: Working - Dropdown, sliders, toggles all functional
verified_features.run_prediction: Working - Triggers prediction and updates UI
verified_features.sse_guardian_ai_alert: Working - Toast notifications for risk levels
